collection_rules_condition_required_chk.name: collection_rules_condition_required_chk
collection_rules_condition_required_chk.value: ("collection_rules"."relation" IN ('is_set', 'is_not_set') AND "collection_rules"."condition" IS NULL) OR ("collection_rules"."relation" NOT IN ('is_set', 'is_not_set') AND "collection_rules"."condition" IS NOT NULL)

commission_rules_scope_vendor_consistenc.name: commission_rules_scope_vendor_consistency_chk
commission_rules_scope_vendor_consistenc.value:
("commission_rules"."scope" = 'default' AND "commission_rules"."vendor_id" IS NULL) OR
        ("commission_rules"."scope" = 'vendor' AND "commission_rules"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL)

commission_rules_date_range_chk.name: commission_rules_date_range_chk
commission_rules_date_range_chk.value: "commission_rules"."starts_at" IS NULL OR "commission_rules"."ends_at" IS NULL OR "commission_rules"."starts_at" <= "commission_rules"."ends_at"

discounts_date_range_chk.name: discounts_date_range_chk
discounts_date_range_chk.value: "discounts"."starts_at" IS NULL OR "discounts"."ends_at" IS NULL OR "discounts"."starts_at" <= "discounts"."ends_at"

discounts_scope_vendor_consistency_chk.name: discounts_scope_vendor_consistency_chk
discounts_scope_vendor_consistency_chk.value:
("discounts"."scope" = 'platform' AND "discounts"."vendor_id" IS NULL) OR
        ("discounts"."scope" = 'vendor' AND "discounts"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL) OR
        ("discounts"."scope" = 'targeted_vendors' AND "discounts"."vendor_id" IS NULL)

files_scope_vendor_link_chk.name: files_scope_vendor_link_chk
files_scope_vendor_link_chk.value: ("files"."scope" = 'platform' AND "files"."vendor_id" IS NULL) OR ("files"."scope" = 'vendor' AND "files"."vendor_id" IS NOT NULL)

notifications_recipient_consistency_chk.name: notifications_recipient_consistency_chk
notifications_recipient_consistency_chk.value:
("notifications"."recipient_type" = 'user' AND "notifications"."user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notifications"."customer_id" IS NULL) OR
        ("notifications"."recipient_type" = 'customer' AND "notifications"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notifications"."user_id" IS NULL)

variants_vendor_sku_unique.name: variants_vendor_sku_unique
variants_vendor_sku_unique.where: "variants"."sku" IS NOT NULL AND "variants"."deleted_at" IS NULL
